Seedha Indian prices

Simple Pricing

Koi subscription trap nahi. Ek baar pay karo, 30 din use karo.

✅ GPay · PhonePe · Paytm · Any UPI accepted
Free
Free
500 credits · 30 days
  • 500 credits
  • 5 AI voices
  • 500 chars/generation
  • Hindi & English only
  • MP3 download
Current Plan
Starter
₹99
5,000 credits · 30 days
  • 5,000 credits
  • 20 AI voices
  • 2,000 chars/generation
  • All Indian languages
  • MP3 download
  • Email support
MOST POPULAR
Pro
₹249
15,000 credits · 30 days
  • 15,000 credits
  • 50 AI voices
  • 5,000 chars/generation
  • All languages
  • API access
  • Priority support
  • Commercial use
Unlimited
₹499
50,000 credits · 30 days
  • 50,000 credits
  • 100+ AI voices
  • 10,000 chars/generation
  • All languages
  • API access
  • Dedicated support
  • Commercial use
  • Team access

FAQ

Kaise pay karna hai?

GPay, PhonePe, Paytm ya koi bhi UPI app use kar sakte ho. QR scan karo, pay karo, UTR number ya screenshot submit karo. 1-2 ghante mein credits add ho jayenge.

Credits expire hote hain kya?

Haan, credits 30 din mein expire ho jaate hain paid plans mein. Free plan ke credits kabhi expire nahi hote (sirf 500 credits).

Refund policy kya hai?

Agar credits add nahi hue aur payment confirm ho gayi, toh full refund milega. Ek baar credits use ho gaye toh refund nahi hoga.

Commercial use kar sakte hain?

Pro aur Unlimited plans mein commercial use allowed hai. Free aur Starter sirf personal use ke liye hai.

Voices kaisi quality ki hain?

Hum Microsoft Neural voices use karte hain — same technology jo Fortune 500 companies use karti hain. Crystal clear quality hai.

VoiceFlow

India's most affordable professional text-to-speech platform. Convert any text into natural-sounding voices in 20+ Indian languages.
